newsSince: Genuine fundamental progress since June 9: on June 14 Hyosung HICO signed a JV with a Quanta subsidiary (Hyosung HICO BREAKER, LLC) to begin US production of 72.5-800kV gas circuit breakers in October at Canonsburg, PA - the first Korean firm with US production bases for both UHV transformers and UHV breakers. On June 19 LS Securities raised its target to KRW5.3M.

sources.label: Seoul Economic: Hyosung first US UHV breaker production w/ Quanta JV
Seoul Economic: LS Securities lifts Hyosung Heavy target to 5.3M won
PRNewswire: Hyosung Heavy record order, US strategy
BigGo: target hikes toward ~KRW4M on AI/grid demand

verdicts.rankRationale: No new fundamental evidence since June 9; the +4% move is flow, not news. On a crowding-sensitive alpha list this remains Korea's most-expensive stock at +96% YTD with consensus target hikes chasing it — the opposite of hidden/under-owned. Residual alpha eroded; hold the penalized rank 52.
verdicts.bull: Record US 765kV transformer backlog (KRW15.1T); structural AI/grid power bottleneck; margin expansion.
verdicts.neutral: Order story intact but fully reflected; alpha now consensus.
verdicts.bear: Korea's priciest stock, +96% YTD, target-chasing; far from passives core, crowding risk.
